lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear consistent with regular use. The interior is clean and well-maintained. All mechanical systems are in good working order.

This vehicle is in poor condition. It shows significant signs of wear and has several major mechanical and cosmetic issues that require immediate attention. It is not currently in reliable working order for regular use.
Good condition.

Step into luxury with this absolutely stunning vehicle! It is in mint condition, looking and driving exactly like it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. Every detail, from the flawless paint to the pristine interior, has been meticulously preserved. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly exceptional car that has been cared for with the utmost pride. It's ready for its next owner to enjoy a perfect driving experience!

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows consistent signs of use. While it is fully operational and currently roadworthy, the engine has a few minor leaks and the body has some noticeable scratches and small dents. The interior is functional but exhibits significant wear on the upholstery. This is an honest, drivable car that would benefit from some cosmetic and mechanical attention to reach its full potential.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine runs smoothly with no mechanical issues to report, and the transmission shifts cleanly. On the exterior, the paint still holds a nice shine, though you may find a few minor stone chips and light surface scratches consistent with normal use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free; the upholstery is in great shape with no rips or tears, and all power features, including the AC and infotainment system, are fully functional. Recent service includes an oil change and a multi-point inspection, confirming that the brakes and tires still have plenty of life left. It’s a reliable, solid car that is ready for its next owner without needing immediate repairs.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no cosmetic or mechanical imperfections. Meticulously preserved and strictly garage-kept, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a specimen of unparalleled integrity and performance.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty in person—it's in absolutely flawless condition and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s been kept in tip-top shape. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically brand new and ready for some adventures, you’ve found it! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is a pristine E46 M3, a pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. This example features the S54B32 inline-six engine, characterized by its high-pressure Double VANOS variable valve timing and individual throttle bodies for instantaneous throttle response.
Mint condition car. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Inspection ready.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, preserving its flawless original paint and deep, mirror-like finish. Inside, the premium leather interior remains supple and scent-free, showing absolutely zero signs of wear on the bolsters or controls. Every mechanical component performs exactly as it did the day it left the factory, supported by a comprehensive, documented service history. With exceptionally low mileage and a clean title, this car represents the pinnacle of its class. It features all available luxury options, including the premium sound system and advanced driver assistance package. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly 'like-new' vehicle that satisfies even the most discerning collector's standards.

Presenting an unrivaled opportunity to acquire a vehicle of superlative caliber. This motorcar has been preserved in showroom condition, reflecting a level of care that borders on the fastidious. With its flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new, this specimen represents the pinnacle of its class. Rigorously inspected and maintained to exacting standards, it offers a driving experience that is as precise as it is refined. For the individual who demands nothing short of excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no signs of wear and offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original factory delivery. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior paint, reflects a history of meticulous stewardship. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality and mechanical integrity.

Hey everyone! 🚗 I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this beauty is in such incredible shape, it still has that 'new car' feel! It’s been pampered since day one—always garage-kept and meticulously maintained. You really won’t find a single flaw. It drives like an absolute dream and I’m so excited for its next owner to enjoy it as much as I have! Come see it for yourself! ✨

Available for acquisition is a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine Laguna Seca Blue. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, characterized by its individual throttle bodies and a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 420G six-speed manual gearbox, delivering power through a variable M-differential lock. Mechanically, this vehicle is impeccable: the high-pressure VANOS system has been proactively overhauled, and the rear subframe has undergone structural reinforcement to ensure chassis rigidity under high lateral loads. The suspension retains its factory-spec damping characteristics, and the braking system utilizes ventilated rotors with optimal thermal dissipation. Zero fluid seepage, documented compression test results across all six cylinders, and original factory paint depth readings. This is a turn-key collector-grade example for the discerning enthusiast seeking peak analog performance.
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Original paint. Full service history. Clean title in hand.
Used car. Condition: mint.

We are pleased to present this vehicle in exemplary, mint condition. Meticulously maintained to the highest standards, this automobile offers a pristine aesthetic paired with unrivaled mechanical integrity. Every detail has been preserved to ensure a showroom-quality experience for the discerning enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber and uncompromising quality.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to a standard that defies its previous ownership. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless aesthetic profile and mechanical integrity that is beyond reproach. Every detail has been preserved with meticulous care, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality and uncompromising provenance.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly stunning condition—honestly, it looks and feels brand new! I've babied it since day one, and it's been kept sparkling clean. It's a smooth, perfect ride that's ready for its next home. You seriously have to see it to believe how pristine it is!

This is a museum-grade example of the E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double-VANOS timing. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec variable M-differential lock. The chassis is exceptionally rigid, benefiting from a documented rear subframe reinforcement and a suspension geometry that remains factory-spec with Bilstein B6 dampers. Every fluid line is dry, the VANOS system has been bulletproofed, and the rod bearings were replaced as preventative maintenance. Finished in concourse-level Carbon Black Metallic, the interior shows zero bolster wear and retains the tactile feedback of a fresh-from-the-factory cockpit. This is a turn-key collector piece for the discerning purist.
Used car in mint condition. Garage kept. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Smoke-free interior.

Offering a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that presents as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections or rock chips, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather remains supple with absolutely no bolster wear, and the factory scent persists. Every electronic component and switch operates with tactile precision. Meticulously maintained with a comprehensive, open-checkbook service history, this vehicle has been strictly garage-kept and never driven in inclement weather. From the spotless engine bay to the curb-rash-free factory wheels, every detail has been preserved to meet the most discerning standards. This is a rare opportunity to own a turn-key masterpiece that requires zero apologies.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits an uncompromising level of preservation, manifesting a showroom-fresh aesthetic and mechanical integrity that will satisfy the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, underscores its superior pedigree. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in peerless condition.

Offered is a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This specimen is mechanically superlative, boasting a documented rear subframe reinforcement and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis maintains factory-spec torsional rigidity with zero bushing deflection, while the M-Variable differential lock ensures surgical power delivery. The exterior retains its factory luster with no discernible stone chips, and the interior Nappa leather bolsters remain firm and uncreased. This is a turnkey enthusiast example with a linear power band and an 8,000 RPM redline, strictly maintained with a comprehensive service history and no deferred maintenance.
2021 Model. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior is flawless. Full service records included.
